compiled_state.title: Tier B: Port ticket_edit (EDIT event, field validation) to rebar._commands.composer
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
edit field parsing (--title/--priority/--assignee/--ticket_type/--description/--tags/--parent, = and space forms), EDIT event with data.fields, --output handling, validation messages. test-ticket-edit*.sh as the gate.

Port behind REBAR_LEAF_WRITES, switch-wired at dispatcher + library. Default stays bash.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] edit ported to rebar._commands, switch-wired at dispatcher + library
- [ ] Command's bash suite(s) green against REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=bash AND =python
- [ ] Error strings + exit codes byte-identical
- [ ] Default remains bash

comments.body: Ported in 8c51dc97: edit_core+edit_cli with full field validation + --parent re-parent cascade (resolve/self/fail-closed-status/ancestor-walk/null-detach). Dual-run green bash AND python on test-ticket-edit (48) + library parity tests. Default stays bash.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
